dashboard.description: Building B — Network Traffic Monitor with auto-adaptive retention: Raw 24h → 1min 2d → 1hr 30d → 1day 1yr

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.[0-9]+/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(3[2-9]|[4-5][0-9]|6[0-3])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(6[4-9]|[7-8][0-9]|9[0-5])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(9[6-9]|10[0-3])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(11[2-9]|12[0-7])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(12[89]|1[3-5][0-9]|160)/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(16[0-9]|1[7-8][0-9]|19[01])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(19[2-9]|2[01][0-9]|22[0-3])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(22[4-9]|2[3-4][0-9]|25[0-5])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.52\.(10[4-9]|11[01])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.53\.[0-9]+/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.53\.(6[4-9]|[7-9][0-9]|1[01][0-9]|12[0-7])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.53\.(12[89]|1[3-9][0-9]|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^192\.168\.54\.[0-9]+/ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval) fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "v" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "dst" !~ /^239\./
SELECT count("in_bytes") AS "v" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./
SELECT count("in_bytes") AS "v" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^203\.188\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$/ AND "src" !~ /\.1$/ AND "src" !~ /\.255$/ GROUP BY "src"

panels.description: Unique external sites (last 24h only — requires raw dst data).

targets.query: SELECT count(distinct("in_bytes")) FROM "raw_24h"."netflow" WHERE time > now() - 24h AND "src" =~ /^203\.188\.5/ AND "dst" !~ /^203\.188\./ AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "dst" !~ /^10\./ AND "dst" !~ /^172\./ AND "dst" !~ /^192\.168\./ GROUP BY "dst"

panels.title: 🌐 Unique Sites
1️⃣ Top 10 Conversations — คู่สนทนาที่ใช้ Bandwidth มาก

panels.description: Top 10 conversations from pre-aggregated topn data (180-day retention).

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "traffic" FROM "topn_180d"."topn_conversations" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "src", "dst", "app"

panels.title: 📋 Top 10 Conversations
2️⃣ Top Talkers — ใครใช้ Bandwidth มากสุด

panels.description: Top 10 users by bandwidth. All time ranges supported.

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "traffic" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "src" =~ /^203\.188\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]+$/ AND "src" !~ /\.1$/ AND "src" !~ /\.255$/ GROUP BY "src"

panels.title: 📋 Top 10 Users
3️⃣ Top Destinations — ไปที่ไหนมากสุด

panels.description: Top 10 destinations from pre-aggregated topn data (180-day retention).

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "traffic" FROM "topn_180d"."topn_destinations" WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "dst", "app"

panels.title: 📋 Top 10 Destinations
4️⃣ Protocol Distribution — สัดส่วน TCP/UDP/ICMP

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "protocol" = 'tcp'
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "protocol" = 'udp'
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "protocol" = 'icmp'
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "protocol" = 'igmp'
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ AND "protocol" = 'ipv6'

panels.title: 4️⃣ Protocol Distribution — สัดส่วน TCP/UDP/ICMP

targets.query: SELECT sum("in_bytes") FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter AND "dst" !~ /^224\./ GROUP BY time($__interval), "protocol" fill(null)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY time($__interval), "app" fill(0)
SELECT sum("in_bytes") AS "in_bytes" FROM $resolution WHERE $timeFilter GROUP BY "app"

panels.title: 6️⃣ Per Room Usage — ห้องไหน ใครใช้ เท่าไหร่
